message:
perf(freeze): add CV.dupRef/freeRef for direct ref counting (~7.3% faster)

Replace CV→JSValue→C FFI→JSValue→CV roundtrip for ref counting with
direct pointer arithmetic on JSRefCountHeader. dupRef increments ref_count
at offset 0 of the pointed-to object; freeRef decrements and only falls
back to JS_FreeValue when ref_count reaches 0.

Both functions are noinline, replacing ~50 inlined instructions per call
site with a single function call — reducing code size across 881 shards
and improving icache behavior.

Results on TSC benchmark:
- Call cycles: 11,087M → 10,280M (↓ 7.3%)
- CV-to-JSValue conversions: 126M → 64.7M (↓ 48.7%)
